mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (receiver_idx, sender_idx, auction_idx, bid_idx, board_idx, reply_idx, notification_type, notification_title, notification_message, target_url, is_read) VALUES (#{receiverIdx}, #{senderIdx}, #{auctionIdx}, #{bidIdx}, #{boardIdx}, #{replyIdx}, #{notificationType}, #{notificationTitle}, #{notificationMessage}, #{targetUrl}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT notification_idx AS notificationIdx, receiver_idx AS receiverIdx, sender_idx AS senderIdx, auction_idx AS auctionIdx, bid_idx AS bidIdx, board_idx AS boardIdx, reply_idx AS replyIdx, notification_type AS notificationType, notification_title AS notificationTitle, notification_message AS notificationMessage, target_url AS targetUrl, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt, read_at AS readAt FROM notification WHERE receiver_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT notification_idx AS notificationIdx, receiver_idx AS receiverIdx, sender_idx AS senderIdx, auction_idx AS auctionIdx, bid_idx AS bidIdx, board_idx AS boardIdx, reply_idx AS replyIdx, notification_type AS notificationType, notification_title AS notificationTitle, notification_message AS notificationMessage, target_url AS targetUrl, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt, read_at AS readAt FROM notification WHERE receiver_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 'Y', read_at = NOW() WHERE notification_idx = #{notificationIdx} AND is_read = 'N'
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 'Y', read_at = NOW() WHERE receiver_idx = #{memIdx} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE receiver_idx = #{memIdx} AND is_read = 'N'
